action.description:
Introduced by Senators Hesselbein, Habush Sinykin, Drake, Ratcliff, Roys, L. Johnson, Wirch, Dassler-Alfheim, Smith, Carpenter, Larson and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Tenorio, Sinicki, Rivera-Wagner, Miresse, Joers, Subeck, Stubbs, Udell, Roe, McCarville, Snodgrass, Hong, Bare, Arney, Neubauer and Stroud
